tool_args.label: MEPPI sole source for M7 propulsion

payload.claim_text: MEPPI is the sole responsible source for the M7 Propulsion System Equipment and BTEs for the M7 Propulsion System Equipment Upgrade Overhaul and BTE's provided under this contract. No other vendors have access to the proprietary designs, specifications, and drawings for the system and therefore cannot readily provide these components.
payload.subject: MEPPI

evidence_refs.source_quote: MEPPI is the sole responsible source for the M7 Propulsion System Equipment and BTEs for the M7 Propulsion System Equipment Upgrade Overhaul and BTE's provided under this contract. No other vendors have access to the proprietary designs, specifications, and drawings for the system and therefore cannot readily provide these components.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: MEPPI sole source for replacement parts

payload.claim_text: MEPPI is the sole responsible source for the components that will be provided under this contract. No other vendors have access to the proprietary designs, specifications, and drawings for the Propulsion System or materials and therefore cannot readily provide these parts and services.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MEPPI is the sole responsible source for the components that will be provided under this contract. tool_args.label: Last Time Buy notification for M7 critical components

payload.claim_text: Both Railroads have received a Last Time Buy ("LTB") notification from MEPPI, for the Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistor ("IGBT") and High Voltage Distribution Box ("HVDB") Diode, critical components of the M-7 Propulsion System.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Both Railroads have received a Last Time Buy ("LTB") notification from MEPPI, for the Insulated Gate Bipolar Transistor ("IGBT") and High Voltage Distribution Box ("HVDB") Diode, critical components of the M-7 Propulsion System.

payload.claim_text: The propulsion components covered in the M-7 Propulsion System Upgrade Overhaul and BTE are approaching 20 years of service, which is past the industry standard of 15 years of service life.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The propulsion components covered in the M-7 Propulsion System Upgrade Overhaul and BTE are approaching 20 years of service, which is past the industry standard of 15 years of service life.

tool_args.label: LIRR MNR NYC Transit maintenance programs

payload.claim_text: Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR"), Metro-North Railroad ("MNR") (collectively the "Railroads"), and NYC Transit will continue to support its Life Cycle Maintenance and Reliability Centered Maintenance programs, which maintain high car reliability, improve customer service through on-time performance, and provide replacement parts at prescribed intervals.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR"), Metro-North Railroad ("MNR") (collectively the "Railroads"), and NYC Transit will continue to support its Life Cycle Maintenance and Reliability Centered Maintenance programs

payload.description: Estimated total amount for M7 Propulsion System Equipment Upgrade Overhaul contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total Amount: $589,651,280 (Est.)
The initial price proposal submitted was $681,404,003.
Negotiations resulted in the final price of $589,651,280. A savings of $91,752,723 or 13 percent reduction or cost savings was achieved.

payload.description: Estimated total amount for five-year replacement parts contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total Amount: $142,325,007 (Est.)
The initial price proposal submitted was $151,936,550.
A savings of $9,611,543 or 7 percent reduction or cost savings was achieved.

payload.description: Final price after negotiations for five-year replacement parts contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Negotiations resulted in the final price of $142,325,007.
